subcodes.first_line: The lips of utterance have parted in a smile, and the tongue speaketh amidst all contingent beings, that perchance they who slumber may awaken and hear [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد افتر ثغر البیان و ینطق اللسان بین الامکان لعل ینتبهن الذین رقدوا و یسمعن
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @suffering and imprisonment, @study; deepening, @Word of God and human limitations, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @service to others; to the Cause of God
